title: HSE IP/legal review: trademark posture + public-standard source set + non-affiliation framing - GATE
context: 'GED' is a registered trademark with proprietary, copyright-protected test content; the HSE lane is reframed as original practice aligned to publicly available standards and is GATED behind this IP/legal review. No HSE content task starts until this clears. IP/legal reviewer is TO BE SECURED (verifiedNeed=false).
objective: Complete and record the HSE IP/legal review fixing the trademark posture, approving the public-standard source set, and mandating the non-affiliation framing - the gate for all HSE content.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirms no proprietary/trademarked content is reproduced; nominative trademark use only; a clear non-affiliation disclaimer ('not GED/HiSET test content; not affiliated/endorsed')
Approves the public-standard source set (e.g., CCR Standards for Adult Education + openly-licensed descriptors) with provenance + reuse terms recorded
No HSE content task starts until this review clears (recorded in governance)
